title: Regression Checklists
description: Named regression sets the Dashboard exposes as one-click execution targets. Stored at shared/checklists.json. Owned by: Dashboard UI (read/write).

platform.description: Which platform's tests this checklist targets. Android is excluded — it uses a separate framework (ADB + AI vision), not CDP.

note.description: Optional free-form note (owner, scope, version, etc.).

items.description: Ordered regression items, each grouping one or more test case IDs.

label.description: Human-readable regression item name (e.g. '主币代币转账（Cosmos/Polkadot/Tron/Stellar）').

caseIds.description: Test case IDs (matches existing test registry IDs like 'TRANSFER-COSMOS-001'). Empty list is allowed — represents an item that has no automated coverage yet.
